\tzpentry{ID3329}{Coupled Quantum Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3329 introduces Coupled Quantum Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \frac{d \rho}{dt} = - \frac{i}{ \hbar}[ \hat{H}_{ \text{system}}( \Omega), \rho] + \sum_k \gamma_k( \Omega) \left(L_k \rho L_k^ \dagger - \frac{1}{2} \{L_k^ \dagger L_k, \rho \} \right) \end{equation}
